components.name: ds-button
components.purpose: Primary action trigger with multiple variants

components.name: ds-icon-button
components.purpose: Icon-only button for actions or toggles

components.name: ds-badge
components.purpose: Status indicator with dot or count variants
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-chip
components.purpose: Compact interactive element for tags and selections

components.name: ds-toggle
components.purpose: Switch control for on/off states
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-avatar
components.purpose: User representation with image, initials, or icon
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-divider
components.purpose: Visual separator for content sections
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-card
components.purpose: Container for grouped content with slots. Extends ds-surface.
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-tabs
components.purpose: Horizontal navigation between content sections
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-breadcrumb
components.purpose: Navigation trail with overflow collapse for deep hierarchies

components.name: ds-nav-rail
components.purpose: Collapsible side navigation for desktop

components.name: ds-panel
components.purpose: Persistent content region with header, content, and footer slots
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-dialog
components.purpose: Modal overlay requiring user action before continuing

components.name: ds-alert
components.purpose: Inline status message within content flow
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-snackbar
components.purpose: Brief floating message with optional action, auto-dismisses

components.name: ds-toast
components.purpose: Floating notification with accent strip and stacking

components.name: ds-tooltip
components.purpose: Informational popup triggered by hover or focus
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-popover
components.purpose: Anchored floating container for rich content

components.name: ds-menu
components.purpose: Anchored dropdown list of actions or selections

components.name: ds-text-field
components.purpose: Single-line or multi-line text input

components.name: ds-selection-controls
components.purpose: Checkbox, Radio, and Switch for boolean/choice selections
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-slider
components.purpose: Continuous or discrete value selection along a track

components.name: ds-date-picker
components.purpose: Calendar-based date or date range selection

components.name: ds-tag-input
components.purpose: Multi-value input with tag chips and autocomplete

components.name: ds-file-upload
components.purpose: Drag-and-drop zone with file list management

components.name: ds-pagination
components.purpose: Page navigation for paginated content

components.name: ds-stepper
components.purpose: Multi-step progress indicator with navigation

components.name: ds-list
components.purpose: Structured vertical collection of related items

components.name: ds-accordion
components.purpose: Expandable/collapsible content sections

components.name: ds-data-grid
components.purpose: Enterprise data table with sorting, filtering, and row actions

components.name: ds-tree-view
components.purpose: Hierarchical data display with expandable nodes

components.name: ds-timeline
components.purpose: Chronological event sequence display
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-loading
components.purpose: Progress and loading state indicators
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-bottom-nav
components.purpose: Mobile navigation bar with icon + label

components.name: ds-ai-chat
components.purpose: Conversational AI interface with messages, streaming, and rich content
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-command-palette
components.purpose: Global search and action launcher overlay
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-notification-center
components.purpose: Centralized notification inbox panel with categorization and actions
components.motionBehavior: CSS transitions using fast, instant timing

components.name: ds-search
components.purpose: Contextual search with filters, suggestions, and results display

components.name: ds-empty-states
components.purpose: Placeholder displays for views with no data or content

components.name: ds-confidence
components.purpose: AI Confidence Indicator - shows AI model confidence level for generated content
components.motionBehavior: Segment background transitions on confidence level change, uses --motion-fast with --ease-standard

components.name: ds-reasoning-trace
components.purpose: Reasoning Trace Block - displays AI reasoning steps with progressive disclosure (AG-UI ReasoningMessage pattern)
components.responsiveBehavior: Responsive block, stacks vertically on all screens
components.motionBehavior: Chevron rotation on expanded state with --motion-fast transition; content uses display:none/block toggle
interactionRules: Supports RTL with rotate direction reversal

components.name: ds-activity-card
components.purpose: Activity Event Card - AG-UI ActivitySnapshot/ActivityDelta display cards for agent progress
components.responsiveBehavior: Responsive stacked layout, adapts to container width
components.motionBehavior: Fade-in animation on card entry using ds-token-fade-in keyframe with --motion-normal duration; progress bar transitions smoothly

rejectionProtocol.step2_ifNotFound: Search for closest alternative in existing DS
rejectionProtocol.step3: Report to governance: missing component name, use case, recommended alternative, status PENDING HUMAN APPROVAL
rejectionProtocol.step4: Use recommended alternative until governance approves new component
